title: carex dissitiflora subsp. taiwanensis
intro: Carex dissitiflora subsp. taiwanensis is a subspecies of sedge, a type of grass-like perennial plant belonging to the genus Carex, commonly found in Taiwan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. In traditional Taiwanese herbal medicine, Carex dissitiflora subsp. taiwanensis is often prepared as a decoction or tea, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations.
